overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed open world game showing a character walking along a mountain trail through pine forests and rocky terrain. The character encounters a horse rider while exploring the sunlit wilderness with dramatic mountain vistas in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded mountain trail along rocky cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail through the shaded pine forest with a rocky cliff face on the left

entered.detail: steep gray rock formation running alongside the left side of the trail
dense evergreen forest surrounding the path with tall trunks
distant mountain range visible through gaps in the trees
narrow winding dirt path cutting through the forest terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded mountain trail bordered by a steep rocky cliff on the left and dense pine forest. The path winds through the trees with filtered sunlight creating dappled shadows on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit grassy clearing with scattered trees

events.description: encountered a rider on horseback standing at the left edge of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit clearing and passing a stationary horse rider on the left side of the path

notable_agents.action: sitting on a brown horse at the trail's edge, facing away from the path

entered.detail: open sunlit area with tall green grass and scattered wildflowers
prominent light-colored rock mound rising in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a sunlit grassy clearing with scattered pine trees. A rider on horseback appears on the left side of the path as the character walks past. In the distance, a large rock formation becomes visible against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow approaching large rock formation

events.description: trail emerges into wide meadow with large rock mound dominating the view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large rock formation in the open grassland with mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: expansive grassland with scattered boulders and patches of wildflowers
tree-covered slope rising gently in the distance to the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues through an open mountain meadow as the large rock formation grows closer on the left. The trail remains clear ahead with forested hillsides visible in the distance and bright sunlight illuminating the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a shaded forest path into a wide, sun-drenched alpine meadow. It begins beneath a canopy of dense pine trees where filtered sunlight creates dappled shadows against a steep rocky cliff. As the trail winds forward, the forest opens into a bright grassy clearing where the camera passes a rider on horseback while a large rock formation emerges against the blue sky. The scene then expands further into an open mountain meadow, with the distant rock formation growing larger on the left as the path leads toward forested hillsides under brilliant sunlight.
